description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base. The grave features a two-tiered, light gray stone platform, with a prominent upright black stone headstone at one end. The headstone is split into two vertical slabs, one taller than the other, with a cut-out cross shape in the taller slab, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The materials appear to be polished granite or marble, with the headstone having a glossy, reflective finish and the grave platform a matte, slightly textured surface. The monument is designed to be both visually striking and solemn, suitable for a cemetery or memorial park. No visible inscriptions or engravings are present on the headstone.
description: A modern grave monument with a two-tiered gray stone base and a split black headstone featuring a cut-out cross, crafted from polished stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split black headstone with a cut-out cross and the rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the grave platform and the back of the headstone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the stepped grave base.
